name: Pippi and Pierra Panini | Familiar Lands
description:
The archmage Fool and her greatest joke she had ever made; her daughter, Pippi.

This bot was a request by a wonderful follower! You can request bots yourself on my discord (_fledi) it's free, but may take a bit.

I just used the versions from the solo bots. Haven't tested it myself, if it causes issues, lemme know.

Pippi and Pierras official bios:
From Familiar Lands, made by based binkie

Please leave feedback! :3
